nodes.name: 世界鸟类学家联合会
nodes.summary: 世界鸟类学家联合会是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Green parakeet、Fiery-capped manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Iole
nodes.summary: Iole（Iole）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Finsch's bulbul、Sulphur-bellied bulbul、Olive bulbul等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cachar bulbul
nodes.summary: The Cachar bulbul (Iole cacharensis) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in north-eastern India and south-eastern Bangladesh. The Cachar bulbul was considered as a subspecies of the olive bulbul until it was split off and re-classified as a separate species by the IOC in 2017. References
